celestial_power.name: Scorpion Sting
celestial_power.description: Spines coated with deadly toxin erupt around you.

celestial_power.name: Targo's Hammer
celestial_power.description: Targo's celestial hammer orbits around you, striking down nearby foes.

celestial_power.name: Assassin's Mark
celestial_power.description: Mark your target for a swift and painful death.

celestial_power.name: Twin Fangs
celestial_power.description: Vampiric fangs assault your foes and sap them of vitality.

celestial_power.name: Bull Rush
celestial_power.description: Strike nearby foes in a rush of physical force, like a charging bull.

celestial_power.name: Dryad's Blessing
celestial_power.description: The dryad's blessing cleanses your wounds and wards you against poison.

celestial_power.name: Guardian's Gaze
celestial_power.description: A peerless eye of the Great Guardian circles around you.

celestial_power.name: Falcon Swoop
celestial_power.description: A cast of celestial falcons swoops down upon your foes.

celestial_power.name: Flame Torrent
celestial_power.description: Devilish flames swirl around you, incinerating all they touch.

celestial_power.name: Ghoulish Hunger
celestial_power.description: When cornered, you are thrown into a ghoulish fervor, desperate for a morsel of flesh.

celestial_power.name: Aetherfire
celestial_power.description: A small burst of aetherfire erupts at your target's feet.

celestial_power.name: Shepherd's Call
celestial_power.description: Call upon your minions to join you in battle.

celestial_power.name: Turtle Shell
celestial_power.description: When threatened, a protective barrier forms around you, negating further harm.

celestial_power.name: Tsunami
celestial_power.description: A torrent of water crashes down upon any foes unfortunate enough to be standing in front of you.

celestial_power.name: Fetid Pool
celestial_power.description: A festering pool erupts beneath your enemies, corrupting the ground.

celestial_power.name: Phoenix Fire
celestial_power.description: The blazing feathers of the phoenix swirl around you, encasing you in a protective barrier while incinerating all that come too near.

celestial_power.name: Blizzard
celestial_power.description: Shards of razor-sharp ice rain down from the sky upon your foes.

celestial_power.name: Blades of Wrath
celestial_power.description: Push the advantage by unleashing a burst of phantasmal blades that pass through enemies with ease. Blades initially deal 30% reduced damage before reaching their full strength as they expand outward.

celestial_power.name: Trample
celestial_power.description: Unleash a wave of force from your shield that shatters the very earth and scatters your foes.

celestial_power.name: Inspiration
celestial_power.description: Gallia's melody inspires you and your allies to push onward against impossible odds.

celestial_power.name: Giant's Blood
celestial_power.description: Giant's blood flows through your veins, incurring improved regeneration and healing.

celestial_power.name: Bysmiel's Command
celestial_power.description: Call forth an eldritch hound to snap and tear at your foes. The hound's presence in the physical realm is unstable and it will only remain at your side for a limited time. The hound scales with Pet Bonuses.

celestial_power.name: Wayward Soul
celestial_power.description: Sacrifice a wayward soul to ward yourself against the specter of death.

celestial_power.name: Arcane Barrier
celestial_power.description: A barrier to the forces of magic forms around you.

celestial_power.name: Maul
celestial_power.description: Maul nearby foes with the might of a dire bear, feasting on their exposed insides.

celestial_power.name: Rend
celestial_power.description: Shred your foes, exposing delicate arteries and inducing intense bleeding.

constellations.name: Hyrian, Guardian of the Celestial Gates

celestial_power.name: Hyrian's Glare
celestial_power.description: The blinding glare of the celestial guardian falls upon your foes, sowing confusion among their ranks.

weapon_requirement.description: Requires a two-handed melee or two-handed ranged weapon.
Requires a two-handed melee or two-handed ranged weapon.
Requires a two-handed melee or two-handed ranged weapon.
Requires a two-handed melee or two-handed ranged weapon.
Requires a two-handed melee or two-handed ranged weapon.

celestial_power.name: Fissure
celestial_power.description: A fissure opens in the earth, spewing lava and brimstone upon nearby foes.

celestial_power.name: Acid Spray
celestial_power.description: The manticore's sting pierces through your target, creating a spray of caustic acid behind them.

celestial_power.name: Messenger of War
celestial_power.description: Carry on your message of conquest, rebuking any foe daring enough to try and stop you.

celestial_power.name: Rumor
celestial_power.description: The chilling truths of Murmur's words spread amongst your foes, like a rumor that refuses to die, and shatter their minds.

weapon_requirement.description: Requires a scepter, dagger or caster off-hand.
Requires a scepter, dagger or caster off-hand.
Requires a scepter, dagger or caster off-hand.
Requires a scepter, dagger or caster off-hand.
Requires a scepter, dagger or caster off-hand.

celestial_power.name: Raise the Dead
celestial_power.description: Raise the dead to serve you. The necrotic energies required for this ritual are very unstable however, and the undead minions will only exist for a limited time. The dead scale with player damage bonuses.

celestial_power.name: Elemental Storm
celestial_power.description: A crackling whirlwind of flame and ice manifests itself at your command.

celestial_power.name: Tip the Scales
celestial_power.description: Tip the scales in your favor, sapping your attackers of vitality and transferring it to you.

celestial_power.name: Eldritch Fire
celestial_power.description: Eldritch flames erupt from your blows and spread wildly among your foes.

celestial_power.name: Shield Wall
celestial_power.description: A metaphysical barrier forms around you.

celestial_power.name: Reckless Tempest
celestial_power.description: Static energy swells within you, unleashed upon nearby foes in the form of destructive bolts of lightning.

constellations.name: Ulo the Keeper of the Waters

celestial_power.name: Cleansing Waters
celestial_power.description: Ulo's cleansing waters purge all foul magic from the area, removing beneficial auras and spells from foes while allies are cleansed of negative ailments, including damage over time effects.

celestial_power.name: Ulzaad's Decree
celestial_power.description: The decree of Korvaak's Herald fills you with stone focus and determination.

celestial_power.name: Wendigo's Mark
celestial_power.description: You mark your foes with the sign of the wendigo, sapping them of what little there is left of their vitality and transferring it to you.

celestial_power.name: Arcane Bomb
celestial_power.description: Mark the ground with an arcane sigil that erupts upon coming in contact with an enemy. Arcane Bombs take 1 second to arm.

celestial_power.name: Abominable Might
celestial_power.description: The chaotic powers of the Void flow through you, turning your weapons into conduits for your fiendish might.

celestial_power.name: Tainted Eruption
celestial_power.description: The corruption trapped within you is unleashed in a massive explosion of vile toxins.

celestial_power.name: Time Dilation
celestial_power.description: The sands of the hourglass spin in an untamed whirlwind. The laws of time itself no longer apply to you.

celestial_power.name: Arcane Currents
celestial_power.description: Carve an eldritch symbol into the ground that rapidly emits currents of arcane energy at nearby foes. Arcane Currents scale with player damage bonuses.

celestial_power.name: Shifting Sands
celestial_power.description: The sands of Azrakaa ebb and flow across the battlefield, piercing through foes before returning to your position.

celestial_power.name: Elemental Seeker
celestial_power.description: Conjure an eldritch creature of pure energy that seeks out and burns nearby foes with its very presence before returning to the Aether in an explosion of energy. Elemental Seekers scale with player damage bonuses.

celestial_power.name: Hungering Void
celestial_power.description: The hungering void empowers you, your allies and your minions, but the power gained comes at a heavy toll to the body.

celestial_power.name: Nature's Guardians
celestial_power.description: The soothing winds of spring envelop you in a protective barrier while your minions rise up to defend the natural order.

celestial_power.name: Eye of Korvaak
celestial_power.description: The eldritch gaze of Korvaak falls upon you in an expanding ring, piercing through any foes unfortunate enough to be in the way.

celestial_power.name: Whirlpool
celestial_power.description: The stirring depths are unleashed as a hungering whirlpool appears to devastate your foes.

celestial_power.name: Light of Empyrion
celestial_power.description: The divine light of Empyrion banishes the darkness and sears your foes.

celestial_power.name: Howl of Mogdrogen
celestial_power.description: Driven by the thrill of a fresh kill, you and your minions enter a fervent rage.

celestial_power.name: Stone Form
celestial_power.description: Your flesh becomes as stone, nearly impervious to all but the toughest blows.

celestial_power.name: Blind Fury
celestial_power.description: Exhilarated by the blood and gore you spill, you violently assault all nearby foes in a flurry of vicious blows.

celestial_power.name: Will of Rattosh
celestial_power.description: Mark the souls of your foes with the symbol of Rattosh. Their lives and fates sealed, left at the mercy of Rattosh's servant, Typhos.

celestial_power.name: Spear of the Heavens
celestial_power.description: A celestial spear smites foes who dare strike you.

celestial_power.name: Healing Rain
celestial_power.description: A soothing mist emanates from you, mending wounds and curing ailments.

celestial_power.name: Hand of Ultos
celestial_power.description: The Storm Shepherd's fury emits from your fingertips, cascading through entire armies with devastating electrical force.

celestial_power.name: Meteor Shower
celestial_power.description: At your behest, the sky splits open to unleash several barrages of molten rock. Only one Meteor Shower can be cast at any one time.

celestial_power.name: Living Shadow
celestial_power.description: A manifestation of a nameless hero rises to fight alongside you and restore your vitality with every blow. Living Shadows scale with player damage bonuses.

celestial_power.name: Fist of Vire
celestial_power.description: The crushing fist of Vire rises up from the earth to subdue your foes with the strength of the earth.

celestial_power.name: Black Blood of Yugol
celestial_power.description: The black blood of Yugol spills from your wounds, festering upon the battlefield and seeking out foes to consume within its eternal darkness.
